- objective: REDESIGN ChatScreen layout to fix overcrowded header. Current header has too many items in one row and doesn't fit on mobile.

CURRENT LAYOUT (src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx):
- One horizontal header row with: Back button | Title | Calendar text | Connection selector | Persona selector | Group avatars | Panel buttons (inventory, quests, calendar, character, director, memory, export)
- Panel components open as side panels on the right

```
‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
‚îÇ ‚Üê ‚îÇ Chat title ‚îÇ Calendar + Weather ‚îÇ  ‚Üê compact top bar
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¨‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ                            ‚îÇ üìÖ      ‚îÇ
‚îÇ     Chat messages          ‚îÇ üéí      ‚îÇ  ‚Üê right vertical icon bar
‚îÇ                            ‚îÇ üìú      ‚îÇ     (panel buttons)
‚îÇ                            ‚îÇ üßÝ      ‚îÇ
‚îÇ                            ‚îÇ üìñ      ‚îÇ
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î§
‚îÇ üîå Connection ‚îÇ üë§ Char ‚îÇ üé≠ Persona‚îÇ  ‚Üê bottom bar (narrative controls)
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
```

### Changes needed in ChatScreen.tsx:

### Step 1: Top bar ‚Äî minimal
Replace the current header with a compact top bar:
- Back button: just "‚Üê" (remove "Zpƒõt na chaty" text), make it a proper clickable button with rounded background
- Chat title: truncated, font-display
- Calendar + weather: compact text (already formatted by formatCalendarDateShort) 
- Remove: connection selector, persona selector, group avatars, ALL panel buttons

### Step 2: Right vertical sidebar ‚Äî panel icons
Add a thin vertical bar on the RIGHT side with panel icon buttons. Each button:
- 32x32px square, rounded, border, centered
- Active state: accent background
- Icons (top to bottom): üìÖ (calendar), üéí (inventory), üìú (quests), üßÝ (memory), üìñ (export)
- Use same styling as the existing panel buttons but stacked vertically
- Class: `flex flex-col gap-1.5 p-1.5`
- Show BETWEEN the message area and the side panels (when a panel is open)
- Position: absolute right-0 or as a fixed-width column

### Step 3: Bottom bar ‚Äî narrative controls
Add a thin bar at the BOTTOM with:
- Connection name (text, not a selector ‚Äî just display which connection is active)
- A divider (vertical line)
- Character info (üßç icon + name, clickable ‚Üí opens character panel)
- Persona selector dropdown (existing select, just relocated)
- Director button (üé¨ icon)
- Style: border-top, px-4 py-1.5, flex items-center gap-3, small text

### Step 4: Move director/character panels
- Character panel (currently opened by üßç button in header) ‚Üí opens from bottom bar üßç icon
- Director popover (currently üé¨ button in header) ‚Üí opens from bottom bar üé¨ icon
- Keep CalendarPanel as a side panel (opened from right sidebar üìÖ)
- Keep InventoryPanel, QuestsPanel, MemoryPanel, ExportPanel as side panels (opened from right sidebar)

### Step 5: Panel visibility
- Remove the right sidebar buttons that are in the bottom bar (character, persona, director)
- Only these go in RIGHT SIDEBAR: üìÖ üéí üìú üßÝ üìñ
- The bottom bar handles: connection display, character panel, persona selector, director

### Step 6: Mobile responsiveness
- Right sidebar: always visible, thin (40px wide)
- Bottom bar: compact, wraps on very small screens
- Panel icons: smaller on mobile (28x28px)

### Step 7: Clean up
- Remove unused imports from ChatScreen.tsx that are no longer needed
- Remove the `calendarOpen` panel button from the icon bar (it's now in right sidebar)
- Keep the CalendarPanel, InventoryPanel, etc. ‚Äî they're still used, just opened from different buttons

### Step 8: Verify
- `npx tsc --noEmit`
- `npm test`

IMPORTANT: 
- Keep ALL existing panel components (CalendarPanel, InventoryPanel, QuestsPanel, MemoryPanel, CharacterPanel, DirectorPopover) ‚Äî don't modify them
- Keep all existing functionality ‚Äî just rearrange the UI
- DO NOT break any existing panel opening/closing logic
- The `panels` object from `useChatPanels()` should still work ‚Äî just wire the buttons to the correct panel setter
- Director and Character panels were opened by `panels.setDirectorOpen` and `panels.setCharacterOpen` ‚Äî keep those working

OUTPUT: Summary of all files changed and verification results.

### SUMMARY
Redesigned `ChatScreen.tsx` layout from a single overcrowded header row into a three-zone layout: compact top bar (back button, title, calendar/weather), right vertical icon sidebar (5 panel toggle buttons: üìÖüéíüìúüßÝüìñ), and bottom narrative-controls bar (connection name, group avatars, character button, persona selector, director button). All existing panel components, state management, and functionality are preserved ‚Äî only the UI arrangement changed. TypeScript compiles cleanly; all 480 relevant tests pass (3 pre-existing calendar-formatting test failures are unrelated).

### EVIDENCE
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx:1-43` ‚Äî all imports preserved; none became unused after the re-arrangement
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx:76-103` ‚Äî new `PanelIconButton` helper component defined for the right sidebar
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx:293-319` ‚Äî compact top bar: back button (‚Üê only, rounded), truncated title, calendar+weather (hidden on mobile via `hidden sm:inline`)
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx:419-454` ‚Äî right vertical icon bar with `PanelIconButton` instances for calendar/inventory/quests/memory/export
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx:730-873` ‚Äî bottom bar: connection name text, group avatars with popover, character button (üßç + name), persona selector dropdown, director button (üé¨)
- `npx tsc --noEmit` ‚Äî exit code 0, no errors
- `npm test` (vitest) ‚Äî 30/31 test files passed (480/483 tests); 3 failures in `src/memory/calendar.test.ts` are pre-existing (formatCalendarDateShort/calendarDescription output format changes unrelated to layout)

### CHANGES
- `src/ui/chat/ChatScreen.tsx` ‚Äî replaced the single-row header with compact top bar; added right vertical icon sidebar with `PanelIconButton` helper; added bottom narrative-controls bar; relocated group avatars, persona selector, character button, and director button from header to bottom bar

### RISKS
- None observed. The mutual-exclusivity panel state (`useChatPanels`) is untouched ‚Äî opening a side panel still closes any other open panel. The `DirectorPopover` still renders at root level and is toggled from the bottom bar. All existing panel components receive the same props.

None.
